title: helichrysum depressum
intro: Helichrysum depressum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum depressum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
